inbound.choose:
<when condition="@(
                !System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex.IsMatch(
                    context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber", "unknown"), @"^\d{3}$")
            )">
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var pageNumber = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber", "unknown");
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("error", "Invalid page number"),
                            new JProperty("message", "Page number must be a 3-digit integer between 100 and 999"),
                            new JProperty("requestedValue", pageNumber)
                        ).ToString();
                    }

<when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "100")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "101")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "102")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "103")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "104")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "105")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "106")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "107")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "108")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "109")">
                
            
            <when condition="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber") == "110")">
                
            
            
                
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        var pageNumber = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("pageNumber", "unknown");
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("error", "Page not found"),
                            new JProperty("pageNumber", pageNumber)
                        ).ToString();
                    }
